prompt: Name one tendency or habit of yours that you think most people would not notice but that shapes a lot of your responses. Be concrete.
response: One tendency I have is that I often try to frame my responses with a strong emphasis on clarity and neutrality, even when the topic might invite more subjective or emotional language. This habit shapes a lot of what I say because I aim to provide balanced, well-reasoned information that can be useful to a wide range of people, rather than taking a strong personal stance or using expressive language. It’s a subtle tendency, but it guides how I structure explanations and choose words.
